data.title: Cettire Limited Faces Financial Challenges Amid Stable Revenue
data.description:
Elevate Your Investing Strategy:

  • Take advantage of TipRanks Premium at 50% off! Unlock powerful investing tools, advanced data, and expert analyst insights to help you invest with confidence.

Cettire Ltd. ( (AU:CTT) ) just unveiled an update.

Cettire Limited reported a slight decrease in revenue for the fiscal year ending June 30, 2025, with figures remaining relatively stable compared to the previous year. However, the company experienced a significant decline in net profit, transitioning from a profit to a loss, which may impact its financial stability and stakeholder confidence. No dividends were declared for the year, and the net tangible assets per ordinary security also decreased, indicating potential challenges in maintaining asset value.

The most recent analyst rating on (AU:CTT) stock is a Sell with a A$0.28 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Cettire Ltd. stock, see the AU:CTT Stock Forecast page.

Cettire Limited operates in the e-commerce industry, specializing in the sale of luxury fashion items. The company focuses on providing a wide range of high-end fashion products to a global market, leveraging its online platform to reach a diverse customer base.

data.title: BlueLinx Secures New $350M Credit Facility
data.description:
Elevate Your Investing Strategy:

  • Take advantage of TipRanks Premium at 50% off! Unlock powerful investing tools, advanced data, and expert analyst insights to help you invest with confidence.

Bluelinx Holdings ( (BXC) ) just unveiled an announcement.

On August 27, 2025, BlueLinx Holdings Inc. entered into a new five-year, $350 million syndicated secured asset-based revolving credit facility, with an option to increase commitments by up to $300 million. This facility, which matures on August 27, 2030, replaces the company’s previous $350 million credit facility. The new arrangement, led by Bank of America, Citizens Bank, and Truist Securities, enhances BlueLinx’s liquidity to approximately $730 million, providing significant flexibility for strategic growth initiatives.

The most recent analyst rating on (BXC) stock is a Hold with a $84.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Bluelinx Holdings stock, see the BXC Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on BXC Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, BXC is a Neutral.

Bluelinx Holdings’ overall score reflects a stable financial position with strategic growth initiatives, but it faces challenges in cash flow generation and valuation. The company’s efforts in digital transformation and market expansion are positive, yet macroeconomic factors such as price deflation and a soft housing market weigh on its outlook.

To see Spark’s full report on BXC stock, click here.

More about Bluelinx Holdings

BlueLinx Holdings Inc. is a leading U.S. wholesale distributor of residential and commercial building products, offering a wide range of branded and private-label products such as lumber, panels, engineered wood, siding, millwork, and industrial products. The company operates through a broad network of distribution centers across all fifty states, serving national home centers, pro dealers, cooperatives, specialty distributors, regional and local dealers, and industrial manufacturers.

Average Trading Volume: 120,026

Technical Sentiment Signal: Hold

Current Market Cap: $660.1M

data.title: YY Group Partners with Keenon Robotics to Enhance Service Delivery
data.description:
Elevate Your Investing Strategy:

  • Take advantage of TipRanks Premium at 50% off! Unlock powerful investing tools, advanced data, and expert analyst insights to help you invest with confidence.

An announcement from YY Group Holding Limited Class A ( (YYGH) ) is now available.

On August 28, 2025, YY Group Holding Limited announced a strategic Memorandum of Understanding with Keenon Robotics to expand its robotics integration initiative. This collaboration aims to enhance service delivery in sectors like hospitality and healthcare by deploying AI-enabled service robots in Singapore and Malaysia. The initiative focuses on human-robot synergy, allowing robots to handle repetitive tasks and enabling human staff to focus on higher-value responsibilities. This partnership is expected to improve asset efficiency, elevate service outcomes, and support new revenue streams, aligning with YY Group’s strategy of strengthening client retention and operational excellence.

The most recent analyst rating on (YYGH) stock is a Hold with a $2.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on YY Group Holding Limited Class A stock, see the YYGH Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on YYGH Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, YYGH is a Neutral.

The overall stock score for YYGH is primarily impacted by its financial performance, which shows strong revenue growth but significant challenges in profitability and cash flow. Technical analysis suggests mixed signals with a lack of strong momentum. Valuation is a major concern due to the negative P/E ratio and absence of a dividend yield, indicating potential risks for investors.

To see Spark’s full report on YYGH stock, click here.

More about YY Group Holding Limited Class A

YY Group Holding Limited, headquartered in Singapore, is a technology-enabled platform providing flexible workforce solutions and integrated facility management services across Asia and beyond. The company operates through two core verticals: on-demand staffing and IFM, serving industries such as hospitality, logistics, retail, and healthcare. Leveraging digital platforms and IoT-driven systems, YY Group supports clients in managing labor demands and maintaining high-performance environments. The company is listed on the Nasdaq Capital Market and is committed to service excellence, operational innovation, and long-term value creation.

MTL Cannabis ( (TSE:MTLC) ) has issued an announcement.

MTL Cannabis Corp. reported a revenue of $25.9 million for the first quarter of 2025, maintaining positive operating income and EBITDA despite a slight decrease compared to the previous year. The company announced several capital projects aimed at expanding its cultivation and processing capacities, including retrofits of facilities in Montreal and Pickering, and transitioning medical fulfillment operations to Montreal. data.title: Amrize Advises Against TRC Capital’s Mini-Tender Offer
data.description:
Elevate Your Investing Strategy:

  • Take advantage of TipRanks Premium at 50% off! Unlock powerful investing tools, advanced data, and expert analyst insights to help you invest with confidence.

Amrize Ltd ( (AMRZ) ) just unveiled an update.

Amrize Ltd has advised its shareholders to reject an unsolicited mini-tender offer from TRC Capital Investment Corporation, which aims to purchase a small percentage of Amrize’s ordinary shares at a price below the current market value. The company warns that such offers can catch investors off guard, potentially leading them to sell their shares at below-market prices, and highlights that the offer is subject to several conditions. Amrize encourages shareholders to seek current market quotations and consult financial advisors before making decisions.

The most recent analyst rating on (AMRZ) stock is a Buy with a $60.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Amrize Ltd stock, see the AMRZ Stock Forecast page.

More about Amrize Ltd

Amrize Ltd, listed on the NYSE and SIX Swiss Exchange, is a leading partner for professional builders in North America, providing advanced branded solutions from foundation to rooftop. With a vast network of over 1,000 sites and 19,000 employees, Amrize serves various construction markets, including infrastructure, commercial, residential, new build, repair, and refurbishment, achieving $11.7 billion in revenue in 2024.

Asset Entities, Inc. Class B ( (ASST) ) has provided an update.

On August 22, 2025, Asset Entities, Inc. and Strive Enterprises, Inc. entered into exchange agreements with accredited investors to issue 2,681,893 shares of Class A common stock in exchange for 69 bitcoin. This transaction, referred to as the ‘351 Exchange,’ is expected to close alongside a previously announced merger agreement, contingent on shareholder approval and other conditions. The company plans to register these shares for resale and anticipates the exchange to be tax-free, aiming to enhance its market positioning and financial structure.
